basic_details.job_title: WAPCOS Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Online for 159 Field Engineer, Field Supervisor and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: WAPCOS Limited (A Government of India Undertaking), ISO 9001:2015, Mini Ratna-I
basic_details.post_name: Assistant Project Manager, Team Leader, Smart Metering Expert, Material Quality Expert, SCADA Expert, Cloud Infrastructure Expert, Cyber Security Expert, Field Engineer, Field Supervisor
basic_details.department: RDSS (Revamped Distribution Sector Scheme) – TPI Projects
basic_details.job_location: Haryana, Chhattisgarh, Andhra Pradesh, Puducherry, Madhya Pradesh, Arunachal Pradesh, Uttar Pradesh, and Nagaland
basic_details.short_information: WAPCOS Limited Recruitment 2026: Get the latest WAPCOS recruitment notification 2026 for 159 Expert/Engineer vacancies on Project Term Basis for work relating to various Projects under RDSS (Revamped Distribution Sector Scheme). The application (CV submission) process is open now and the last date to apply is 26th May 2026. Find WAPCOS vacancies on the official website www.wapcos.co.in. You can also get Free Job Alert of "Upcoming WAPCOS RDSS Expert Recruitment 2026" notifications for freshers and experienced candidates. Also know the direct official link for WAPCOS RDSS Recruitment 2026 apply

important_dates.place of posting: To be finalized at the time of interview

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for WAPCOS RDSS Expert Recruitment 2026. Candidates are advised to check the official website www.wapcos.co.in for any updates regarding fee.

age_limit.details: Age and experience shall be counted as on 30-04-2026. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PWBMD candidates is applicable as per Government rules. No specific upper age limit is mentioned in the notification; candidates must refer to the official notification or WAPCOS website for further details.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill the qualification and experience requirements as on 30-04-2026. The educational qualification must be from a recognized university/institution. Age relaxation for SC/ST/OBC/PWBMD candidates shall be applicable as per Government rules. Applications submitted in formats other than the WAPCOS prescribed proforma will be rejected. Self-attested photocopies of all supporting documents (Date of Birth, Qualification, Experience, Category proof) must accompany the application. | Post-wise Educational Qualification and Experience

salary_details.pay_scale: Salary commensurate with qualification & experience; to be discussed at interview

selection_process: Stage 1 Shortlisting of CVs Based on qualification and experience criteria
Stage 2 Interview / Interaction Salary and place of posting to be discussed; No TA/DA paid
The selection process for WAPCOS RDSS Expert Recruitment 2026 consists of shortlisting of candidates based on qualifications and experience

followed by an Interview. Place of posting will be finalized at the time of interview. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. The management reserves the right to fix criteria to restrict the number of candidates to be called for interview.
how_to_apply: Interested candidates must send their CV via email to [email protected] on or before 26.05.2026. The CV must be in the prescribed WAPCOS format only — applications submitted in any other format will be rejected. The subject line of the email should be in the format: CV for TPI-RDSS Project – (Name of Key Position) – (Years of Experience). The prescribed application proforma and further details are available on the official WAPCOS website www.wapcos.co.in.
Documents to be submitted along with CV:
Self-attested photocopy of Date of Birth certificate
Self-attested photocopies of all educational qualification certificates and marksheets
Proof of category (SC/ST/OBC/PWBMD certificate, if applicable)
No Objection Certificate / Relieving Certificate (for candidates working in Govt. Departments / PSUs / Autonomous Bodies — required at time of joining)

Original certificates along with CVs are required to be brought at the time of joining for verification. The Company is not responsible for returning any original copies of certificates/testimonials submitted with the application.
Send CV to: [email protected] | For details and format visit: https://www.wapcos.co.in
important_instructions: Applications must be submitted in the WAPCOS prescribed proforma only; applications in other formats will be rejected. Self-attested photocopies of all supporting documents (Date of Birth, Qualification, Experience, Category proof) must accompany the application. Age and experience will be reckoned as on 30-04-2026. Candidates working in Government Departments / PSUs / Autonomous Bodies must produce a No Objection / Relieving Certificate at the time of joining. Posts are purely on temporary/project term basis as per WAPCOS project requirements. Number of posts is variable and shall be decided as per project requirement. Place of posting shall be finalized at the time of interview; candidates may be posted anywhere in India or abroad. No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview. The management reserves the right to fix criteria to restrict the number of candidates to be called for interview. The company is not responsible for returning original certificates/testimonials submitted with the application. Subject line of email must follow the format: CV for TPI-RDSS Project – (Name of Key Position) – (Years of Experience). Candidates are advised to visit www.wapcos.co.in regularly for updates.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in WAPCOS RDSS Expert Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: WAPCOS Limited has advertised 159 vacancies for various Expert/Engineer posts including Assistant Project Manager, Team Leader, Smart Metering Expert, Material Quality Expert, SCADA Expert, Cloud Infrastructure Expert, Cyber Security Expert, Field Engineer and Field Supervisor on a project term basis for RDSS projects.

faq.question: Q2. What is the last date to apply for WAPCOS RDSS Expert Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit CVs by email is 26 May 2026, and applications received after this date will not be considered for WAPCOS RDSS Expert/Engineer posts.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for WAPCOS RDSS Expert & Engineer posts?
faq.answer: Applications are accepted only through CV submission via email; candidates must send their CV in the prescribed WAPCOS format to the notified project email ID, and no offline/physical forms are accepted.

faq.question: Q4. Which posts are available under WAPCOS RDSS Expert Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The recruitment includes Assistant Project Manager (3 posts), Team Leader (9), Smart Metering Expert (5), Material Quality Expert (1), SCADA Expert (2), Cloud Infrastructure Expert (1), Cyber Security Expert (1), Field Engineer (46) and Field Supervisor (91) for RDSS projects.

faq.question: Q5. What are the project locations for WAPCOS RDSS Expert Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Shortlisted candidates may be posted at RDSS project locations in Haryana, Chhattisgarh, Andhra Pradesh, Puducherry, Madhya Pradesh, Arunachal Pradesh, Uttar Pradesh and Nagaland, with the exact place of posting to be finalized at the time of interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the educational qualification required for WAPCOS Field Engineer and Field Supervisor posts?
faq.answer: Field Engineer: Degree or Diploma in Electrical/Electrical & Electronics Engineering with relevant power‑sector experience. Field Supervisor: Degree or Diploma in Electrical/Electrical & Electronics/Electronics & Communication/Electronics & Instrumentation/Computer Science/IT with specified years of power‑sector experience.

faq.question: Q7. What experience is required for WAPCOS RDSS Team Leader and Assistant Project Manager posts?
faq.answer: Assistant Project Manager: B.E./B.Tech in Electrical Engineering with minimum 15 years’ experience in the power distribution sector. Team Leader: B.E./B.Tech in Electrical Engineering with minimum 8 years’ experience in the power distribution sector.

faq.question: Q8. What is the experience profile for Smart Metering, SCADA, Cloud and Cyber Security Experts in WAPCOS RDSS projects?
faq.answer: These expert posts require 6–10+ years of experience in the power/IT sector with hands‑on work in smart metering projects (DDUGJY/R‑APDRP/IPDS/RDSS), AMI/AMU, quality inspection, SCADA systems, IT hardware & cloud deployment, security audits, VAPT, and cyber security solutions, depending on the specific role.
